findings.finding: Credential rotation and recovery did not invalidate sessions issued under prior credentials.
findings.proof: The reviewed account and session contracts had no shared authentication epoch and authorization did not compare credential generations.
findings.fix: Account and session now carry a positive authentication_epoch; authorization denies mismatches with SESSION_AUTHENTICATION_STALE.

findings.finding: An individual compromised session could not be revoked before absolute expiry.
findings.proof: Authorization checked live account, membership and tenant state but the session contract had no live status.
findings.fix: SessionStatus is now mandatory and authorization denies every non-ACTIVE session with SESSION_NOT_ACTIVE.
